eval_cmd: bash -n bin/flywheel && grep -q 'set-eval)' bin/flywheel && r="$(pwd)" && d="$(mktemp -d)" && cd "$d" && "$r/bin/flywheel" start evaltest >/dev/null && "$r/bin/flywheel" set-eval 'echo hi && true' >/dev/null && [ "$("$r/bin/flywheel" get .eval_cmd)" = 'echo hi && true' ] && [ "$("$r/bin/flywheel" get .eval_src)" = 'explicit' ] && cd "$r" && rm -rf "$d"

history.by: loop-driver: eval pass (bash -n bin/flywheel && grep -q 'set-eval)' bin/flywheel && r="$(pwd)" && d="$(mktemp -d)" && cd "$d" && "$r/bin/flywheel" start evaltest >/dev/null && "$r/bin/flywheel" set-eval 'echo hi && true' >/dev/null && [ "$("$r/bin/flywheel" get .eval_cmd)" = 'echo hi && true' ] && [ "$("$r/bin/flywheel" get .eval_src)" = 'explicit' ] && cd "$r" && rm -rf "$d") + monitor clean
